auth.login.title: Sign in
profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your account details and security settings.
profile.identity_description: Update your display name while the email remains the central identifier.
profile.password_description: Set a new strong password for your account.
profile.delete_description: This action is permanent. Save anything you still need before deleting the account.
profile.info_banner: This screen is for self-service management. Identity validation and audit logging still happen on the central SSO side.

pages.consent.outcome_approve_generic: Approve to continue back to the requesting application.

pages.consent.footer_note: Both decisions rely on the server-side consent token.
pages.client_access.access_rule_descript: If a client has no active access records, any active user may authorize. Once at least one active record exists, only explicitly assigned active users may authorize.
